---
title: "SIndexRCFS Wrappers"
author: "SIndexRCFS Contributors"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{SIndexRCFS Wrappers}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(SIndexRCFS)
```

# Introduction

This vignette demonstrates the convenience wrappers `ht_age_to_si`, `si_to_ht`, `si_ht_to_age`, and `si_to_y2bh`.

## Examples

```{r examples}
cat('ht_age_to_si(1,50,1,30,0) =>', ht_age_to_si(1,50,1,30,0), '\n')
cat('si_to_ht(1,50,1,30) =>', si_to_ht(1,50,1,30), '\n')
cat('si_ht_to_age(1,30,1,30) =>', si_ht_to_age(1,30,1,30), '\n')
cat('si_to_y2bh(1,30) =>', si_to_y2bh(1,30), '\n')
```
